overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 featuring Geralt exploring the vibrant Mediterranean-style city of Beauclair. The clip showcases bright sunlight, a distinctive teal sky, cobblestone streets, colorful historic architecture, and bustling market areas with NPC pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: uphill cobblestone street with stone townhouses

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily uphill on sunlit cobblestone street with swords on back

notable_agents.action: NPC in red hat and armor walking downhill past Geralt
NPC in brown dress walking ahead on the street

entered.detail: Multi-story stone building with arched doorways, columns, and red flower boxes
Tall weathered stone wall with metal fence running along right side of street
Uneven cobblestone pavement sloping uphill with grass growing between stones

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks uphill on a sunlit cobblestone street lined with historic stone townhouses on the left and a tall wall on the right. A few NPCs walk in the opposite direction, and the architecture features classic European medieval details with potted plants and arched doorways.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow covered alley with stone stairs

events.description: Enters narrow shaded alley between tall buildings, leaving open street
Lighting dims significantly as the alley narrows and becomes covered

agents.ego_description: Geralt climbing stone stairs through narrow passage between buildings

entered.detail: Tall stone walls of adjacent buildings creating a tight passage barely wider than the character
Vines and leafy plants hanging overhead between buildings, creating a canopy
Large orange ceramic planter with green shrub

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a narrow, shaded alley between tall stone buildings. Geralt ascends stone stairs through the enclosed passage, which is decorated with hanging vines and large terracotta pots. The lighting shifts to low light as the sky becomes mostly blocked by the surrounding architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with distinctive red cobblestones and decorative archway

events.description: Exits narrow alley into bright open plaza with red buildings and red cobblestones
Descends stone stairs from upper plaza to lower street level
Passes through stone archway into the market district

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking through sunlit plaza and descending stairs toward the archway

notable_agents.action: NPC standing near stone railing overlooking lower level

entered.detail: Distinctive red-colored cobblestone pavement in open square with patterned arrangement
Bright red painted building with white trim, arched doorways, and green shutters
Vibrant turquoise painted building with white window frames and flower boxes
Decorative stone arch marking the passage between plaza and market street

segments.scene_description: Geralt emerges from the dark alley into a bright, open plaza with distinctive red cobblestones and colorful buildings. He descends stairs toward a decorative stone archway while the vibrant Mediterranean architecture—featuring red and turquoise facades—creates a striking visual contrast against the teal sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: bustling market street with outdoor seating and grand city gate

events.description: Market stalls with colorful awnings and goods become prominent along the street

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking through busy market street toward the large decorative city gate

notable_agents.action: Merchant in orange tunic standing by fruit stall with pumpkins
Woman in blue and white striped dress near outdoor cafe tables

entered.detail: Warm yellow building with green shutters, flower boxes, and ground-floor shop
Wooden market stalls with green awnings displaying fruits, vegetables, and goods
Large elaborate stone archway with decorative carvings, columns, and green copper dome
Outdoor dining tables with white tablecloths and large potted flowers

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks through a bustling market street lined with colorful townhouses, market stalls, and outdoor cafes. The street leads toward an impressive ornate city gate with a green dome. The crowd density increases with merchants and shoppers, while the architecture maintains the vibrant Mediterranean style with yellow, red, and blue facades.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a vibrant Mediterranean city, transitioning from sunlit residential streets through a shaded passage into a bustling urban center. It begins with Geralt walking uphill along a cobblestone road lined with historic stone townhouses and potted plants under a bright sky. As he moves forward, the scene shifts into a narrow, shaded alley where the lighting dims and the camera ascends stone stairs flanked by hanging vines and terracotta pots. The environment then opens up as he emerges from the darkness into a bright plaza of red cobblestones and colorful turquoise facades, descending toward a decorative stone archway. Finally, the camera follows him into a crowded market street filled with outdoor cafes and merchants, moving past vibrant yellow and blue buildings toward an ornate city gate topped with a green dome.
